The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Beta Endorphin, and codes for a total of 267 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or sugar. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids

The protein contains a maximum of 51 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids

Transgenic Nematode rh-Polypeptide-47 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by the nematode, C. elegans , after insertion of a copy of a human gene into its DNA. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
